title: Disruption of the SYNGAP1 PDZ ligand motif accelerates differentiation of human iPSC-derived GABAergic neurons.
abstract: Human iPSC-derived GABAergic neurons with SYNGAP1 haploinsufficiency or PDZ ligand motif disruption show accelerated maturation: increased dendritic length, synaptic density, and structural maturation. Proteomic, phosphoproteomic and RNA-seq analyses show dysregulation of synaptic proteins, RNA processing, and transcriptional control. Demonstrates SYNGAP1 acts in inhibitory as well as excitatory neurons.
methods: iPSC-derived GABAergic neurons, proteomics, phosphoproteomics, RNA-seq
